title: The Secret Admirer
content: For several weeks, Ava found small notes on her desk with kind words and simple compliments. None of them included a name. She wondered who her secret admirer could be. One afternoon, she noticed Ben quietly placing another note before leaving the office. When he realized she had seen him, he smiled nervously. Ava thanked him and invited him for coffee. The mystery ended with the beginning of a wonderful friendship.
